input_idea: I want to start a YouTube channel and earn money quickly

structured_plan.goal: Launch a niche YouTube channel and reach first monetization milestones.
structured_plan.method: Pick a focused topic, publish consistently, optimize videos for search, and validate content with audience feedback.
steps: Choose one niche and define target audience.
Create a 30-day content calendar with 8 video topics.
Set up channel branding, about section, and upload template.
Publish 2 videos weekly with clear titles and thumbnails.
Track watch time, CTR, and retention weekly and refine content.
structured_plan.timeline: First 30 days for setup and initial publishing; 3 months for growth review.

simplified_version: Start a focused YouTube channel with a weekly publishing plan and data-based improvements to reach monetization goals.
action_steps: Select one niche and list 3 audience pain points.
Research 20 competitor videos to identify content gaps.
Produce and upload 2 videos per week for 4 weeks.
Use a thumbnail template for visual consistency.
Review analytics every Sunday and adjust next week topics.
Plan one collaboration or cross-promotion by week 4.

clarity_score.reason: Clarity score is 75/100. Goal defined: 25/25 | Steps present: 25/25 | Timeline present: 25/25 | Overall completeness: 0/25
